briefing: Markets were neutral today with NASDAQ +0.6% and S&P 500 +0.4% — no strong risk-on signal to justify deploying the remaining $777 cash. Per lessons from late June, holding through neutral days and waiting for a genuine multi-signal setup (MACD crossover + bullish RSI + volume surge + price above SMA-20) is the right cadence rather than forcing a buy just to fill open slots.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: On a neutral day, the smartest move is often no move at all. Waiting for multiple confirming signals (trend, momentum, and volume all agreeing) before buying reduces the chance of chasing a weak or random price move.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 在市況中性的日子，最聰明的做法往往是按兵不動。等待多個訊號（趨勢、動能、成交量）同時確認後才入市，可以減低追逐虛假或隨機升勢的風險。

market_education.summary_en: Both major indices posted modest gains today, with the NASDAQ up 0.6% and the S&P 500 up 0.4%, reflecting a broadly steady but unremarkable trading session without a clear catalyst.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日大市表現溫和，納斯達克指數上升0.6%，標普500指數上升0.4%，反映市場氣氛平穩，暫時未見明顯的利好或利淡消息主導走勢。
